Publish a template
Select a composition from your project — it appears in the catalog after moderation

Open and save your project in AE (File → Save), then scan.

02.Scene is detected automatically. Choose a different folder manually if needed. Only the selected scene and its related footage are imported.

Moderation — 1–2 business days · status: Account → Publish
